'''lahuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:averter|averter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:averter|averter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lahuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læhizith|læhizith]] || [[word:læhizij|læhizij]] || [[word:læhizish|læhizish]] || [[word:læhizi|læhizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lahuhuzuth|lahuhuzuth]] || [[word:lahuhuzuj|lahuhuzuj]] || [[word:lahuhuzush|lahuhuzush]] || [[word:lahuhuzu|lahuhuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lahuzuth|lahuzuth]] || [[word:lahuzuj|lahuzuj]] || [[word:lahuzush|lahuzush]] || [[word:lahuzu|lahuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lahufzuth|lahufzuth]] || [[word:lahufzuj|lahufzuj]] || [[word:lahufzush|lahufzush]] || [[word:lahufzuf|lahufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lahuzuthu|lahuzuthu]] || [[word:lahuzuju|lahuzuju]] || [[word:lahuzushu|lahuzushu]] || [[word:lahuzuku|lahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lahuzuth|lahuzuth]] || [[word:lahuzuj|lahuzuj]] || [[word:lahuzush|lahuzush]] || [[word:lahuzu|lahuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lahuzuthul|lahuzuthul]] || [[word:lahuzujul|lahuzujul]] || [[word:lahuzushul|lahuzushul]] || [[word:lahuzukul|lahuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lahuzuthuthu|lahuzuthuthu]] || [[word:lahuzujuju|lahuzujuju]] || [[word:lahuzushushu|lahuzushushu]] || [[word:lahuzuku|lahuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lahuzuthun|lahuzuthun]] || [[word:lahuzujun|lahuzujun]] || [[word:lahuzushun|lahuzushun]] || [[word:lahuzukun|lahuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lahuzuthuoro|lahuzuthuoro]] || [[word:lahuzujuoro|lahuzujuoro]] || [[word:lahuzushuoro|lahuzushuoro]] || [[word:lahuzukuoro|lahuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
